STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLASS_CORE.title: Glass Core
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLASS_CORE.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Glass[/gold] Orb.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLASS_CORE.flavor: A new type of core now commonly used in the tower's automatons. Can also serve as a secondary core for auxiliary operation.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LAST_MACHIAVELLI.title: The Last Machiavelli
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LAST_MACHIAVELLI.descrip: At the start of your turn, choose one of [gold]Minion Sacrifice[/gold], [gold]Minion Dive[/gold], or [gold]Minion Strike[/gold] and add it to your hand.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LAST_MACHIAVELLI.flavor: This book expounds a utilitarian and brutal philosophy, encouraging rulers to trade sacrifice for glory. As the last surviving copy, it has been reborn as a collector's item.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LAST_MACHIAVELLI.selecti: Choose [blue]1[/blue] card to add to your hand.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TWIN_CYCLONE_BLADES.desc: Cards that deal damage will affect all enemies simultaneously (does not affect cards that already affect all enemies).
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TWIN_CYCLONE_BLADES.flav: The blades mounted on the Guardian's mechanical arms, extremely sharp and surprisingly long.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-IRON_CALTROPS.title: Quality Caltrops
STSBOSSANCIENTS-IRON_CALTROPS.descriptio: Whenever you are attacked, apply [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Demise[/gold] to the attacker.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-IRON_CALTROPS.flavor: Caltrops made from parts of the Guardian's mechanical scales. More durable than ordinary caltrops, and very hard to remove once embedded.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN_KNUCKLE.title: Guardian's Knuckle
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN_KNUCKLE.descrip: Whenever [gold]Ostia[/gold] deals damage, deal additional damage equal to its current HP.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN_KNUCKLE.flavor: A retractable mechanical device made from parts of the Guardian's body, designed to increase the impact force of Ostia's charge.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-STEAM_ENGINE.title: Steam Engine
STSBOSSANCIENTS-STEAM_ENGINE.description: At the start of your turn, shuffle a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], then gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-STEAM_ENGINE.flavor: A power device from an older era. When running, it emits hot steam—be careful not to get burned!
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CAPACITOR_DEVICE.title: Capacitor Device
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CAPACITOR_DEVICE.descrip: Whenever a card is [gold]Retained[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it once for this combat and reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue] for this combat.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CAPACITOR_DEVICE.flavor: A highly sophisticated charging device. The designer added a micro energy converter so that the energy during charging can be fully utilized.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MECHANICAL_HUNT.title: Mechanical Hunt
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MECHANICAL_HUNT.descript: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MECHANICAL_HUNT.flavor: A decoration assembled from the remains of many mechanical bodies. The residual power gathered together is still useful.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_SCALE_STACK.title: Copper Scale Stack
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_SCALE_STACK.descr: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]9[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_SCALE_STACK.flavo: A stack of the Guardian's mechanical scales. Though it offers no defense, it greatly damages enemies that attack you.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATED_DEFENSE_OVERHA: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Form Shift[/gold].
An old defense protocol used by the Guardian. It can adaptively adjust its defense capabilities and hasn't completely fallen out of use yet.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_SPRAYER_MODULE.des: Whenever a [red]Status[/red] or [purple]Curse[/purple] card enters your hand, deal [blue]10[/blue] damage to all enemies.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_SPRAYER_MODULE.fla: A conversion device inspired by a nearly extinct legion. It transforms various curses and negative statuses into fire and sprays it at enemies.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_FLOWER_POT.title: Flame Flower Pot
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_FLOWER_POT.descrip: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor Spark[/gold] to all enemies.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_FLOWER_POT.flavor: A small flower that looks like magma. It glows brightly in bright environments, but in darkness it glows dimly and appears green.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SOUL_BURN_BLOOD.title: Soul-Burning Blood
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SOUL_BURN_BLOOD.descript:
Upon pickup, replace [gold]Burning Blood[/gold].
At the start of your turn, heal [blue]6[/blue] HP.
Whenever you enter a new room, lose [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SOUL_BURN_BLOOD.flavor: Your blood burns your soul in exchange for powerful healing. But it's merely a false dawn, quenching thirst with poison.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_DAGGER.title: Quenched Claw Dagger
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_DAGGER.description: [gold]Shivs[/gold] you generate during combat gain the [purple]Fire[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FLAME_DAGGER.flavor: A surface-quenched dagger. It seems to be quite valuable in some market-dominant shooting game.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-WRAITH_FURY.title: Wraith's Fury
STSBOSSANCIENTS-WRAITH_FURY.description: Whenever [gold]Ostia[/gold] dies, all enemies lose HP equal to [blue]16.7%[/blue] of its Max HP.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-WRAITH_FURY.flavor: A badge imbued with the rage and valor of the departed.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_FIRST_STRIKE.de: The first time you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card in each combat, make the enemy lose additional HP equal to its Max HP / [blue]12[/blue] + [blue]1[/blue].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_FIRST_STRIKE.fl: A statue molded from a part of Hexaghost's own flame. Though some of its power is missing, the core remains.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HOT_FORGE.title: Hot Forge
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HOT_FORGE.description: Upon pickup, give one of your [gold]Attack[/gold] cards the [purple]Scorching[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HOT_FORGE.flavor: A forge that burns constantly, giving your weapons infinite potential.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_LANTERN.title: Hellfire Lantern
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_LANTERN.descrip: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies equal to your energy cap × [blue]2[/blue].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_LANTERN.flavor: A lantern burning with the undying flame of the Netherworld. Its effectiveness varies with the wielder's strength.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CARRYING_COIL.title: Carrying Coil
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CARRYING_COIL.descriptio: Whenever a player plays a [gold]Skill[/gold] card, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold] Orb.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CARRYING_COIL.flavor: Steadily conducts energy to where it is needed.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LAPIS_LAZULI.title: Lapis Lazuli
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LAPIS_LAZULI.description: Every [blue]4[/blue] cards you draw, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LAPIS_LAZULI.flavor: As blue as the sky, one of the oldest gemstones. It benefits the wearer by increasing speed.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CREATOR_SWORD.title: Sword of the Cosmos
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CREATOR_SWORD.descriptio: Whenever you generate a card, all players [gold]Forge[/gold] [blue]10[/blue].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CREATOR_SWORD.flavor: In your palm lies the power of the universe.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SHINING_OINTMENT_OCTAHED: At the start of your turn, each player chooses [blue]1[/blue] card from their own deck, then adds it to all players' hands.
It's not just the devil that's after you, and you're not the only one being targeted.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-WAFFLE.title: Waffle
STSBOSSANCIENTS-WAFFLE.description: Upon pickup, give all your cards the [purple]Waffle[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-WAFFLE.flavor: Donu's personal collection. It increases the tightening force of connectors, preventing loosening and reducing vibration.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HETERO_CONCENTRIC.title: Hetero Concentric
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HETERO_CONCENTRIC.descri: Upon pickup, choose [blue]2[/blue] non-[gold]Power[/gold] cards and give them the [purple]One Heart[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HETERO_CONCENTRIC.flavor: Though their forms differ, their hearts are as one.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PHONOGRAPH.title: Phonograph
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PHONOGRAPH.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] non-[gold]Power[/gold] card and give it the [purple]Echo[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PHONOGRAPH.flavor: An electric device used to play recorded disc sounds.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-RITUAL_DAGGER.title: Ritual Dagger
STSBOSSANCIENTS-RITUAL_DAGGER.descriptio: Upon pickup, give all [gold]Attack[/gold] cards the [purple]Sacrifice[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold] and increase their damage by [blue]5[/blue].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-RITUAL_DAGGER.flavor: An ornate dagger used by the Bird Cult for sacrifices. Its blade has special grooves to draw blood.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FRIENDSHIP_PROOF.title: Proof of Friendship
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FRIENDSHIP_PROOF.descrip:
[gold]Ostia[/gold] no longer takes damage for you.
At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to its Max HP.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FRIENDSHIP_PROOF.flavor: A symbol of the friendship between Donu and Deca, though their friendship no longer needs such external objects to sustain.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONUT_DOLL.title: Donu Doll
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONUT_DOLL.description: At the start of your turn, all players gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONUT_DOLL.flavor: A cute Donu doll. Who wouldn't want one?
STSBOSSANCIENTS-EIGHT_BODY_DOLL.title: Deca Doll
STSBOSSANCIENTS-EIGHT_BODY_DOLL.descript: At the start of your turn, all players gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Plated Armor[/gold] and [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-EIGHT_BODY_DOLL.flavor: A cute Deca doll. Who wouldn't want one?
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MECHANICAL_DESSERT.title: Mechanical Dessert
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MECHANICAL_DESSERT.descr:
Gain [blue]25[/blue] Max HP.
At the start of odd-numbered turns, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
At the start of even-numbered turns, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MECHANICAL_DESSERT.flavo: A dessert that only suits mechanical palates. But if you force it down, the effect remains unchanged.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-STAR_FRUIT.title: Star Fruit
STSBOSSANCIENTS-STAR_FRUIT.description: Whenever you gain {Stars:starIcons()}, gain an equal amount of {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-STAR_FRUIT.flavor:
A mysterious fruit that gives the eater strength.
It has a dreamlike taste... leaving a strong memory, but one that can only be felt, not described.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SELF_MOLT.title: Self-Molt
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SELF_MOLT.description: Whenever you lose HP, randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] card in your [gold]deck[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SELF_MOLT.flavor: The price of breaking out of one's shell is pain. Those who don't realize that will never grow.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DARK_SOUL.title: Dark Soul
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DARK_SOUL.flavor: That's right, but "BLACK SOULS" is a fan game of "Dark Souls" made by Sushi Yusha Toro.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENING_TAIL.title: Awakened One's Tail
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENING_TAIL.descripti: When you would take lethal damage, restore all HP and clear all debuffs. (Once per combat.)
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENING_TAIL.flavor: The tail of the Awakened One. It can be severed to escape fatal danger.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENING_POTION.title: Awakening Potion
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENING_POTION.descrip: Whenever a player plays a [gold]Power[/gold] card, you gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENING_POTION.flavor: "The effect seems powerful, but it has certain restrictions and may cause uncontrollable mutations." — Anonymous
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MOBIUS_RING.title: Möbius Ring
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SILENT_GOLD.title: Silent Gold
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SILENT_GOLD.description: At the end of your turn, if you haven't played any cards, you take no damage until the start of your next turn, and you retain your {Energy:energyIcons()} and cards.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SILENT_GOLD.flavor: Silence brings more than a good end.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIMER.title: Timer
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIMER.description:
Playing cards no longer costs energy, but your turn ends [blue]30[/blue] seconds after it begins.
Pressing [gold]Esc[/gold] makes you lose HP equal to [blue]25%[/blue] of your Max HP.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIMER.flavor: Wanting to grasp the passing time, yet unable to stop it.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MASSARETH_SCRIPTURE.desc: You can now perform [gold]Rituals[/gold] at rest sites.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MASSARETH_SCRIPTURE.flav: You feel that the rituals in the book can connect you closely to some entity.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SCRIBING_INSTRUMENT.desc: You can now [gold]Scribe[/gold] at rest sites.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SCRIBING_INSTRUMENT.flav:
This small cube fits perfectly in your hand, yet inside it contains scan data of countless alien artifacts from the dawn of the universe to the present.
It can replicate these artifacts infinitely. The unknown has never been so tangible.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MYSTERIOUS_COCOON.title: Mysterious Cocoon
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MYSTERIOUS_COCOON.descri:
Upon pickup, remove all basic [gold]Strikes[/gold] from your deck and add [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Training Strikes[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
When experience reaches [blue]10[/blue], upgrade [gold]Training Strike[/gold] into [gold]Piercing Strike[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BELIEVER_SET.title: Believer Set
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BELIEVER_SET.description:
Upon pickup, replace all basic [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold] with [gold]Ritual Strike[/gold] and [gold]Chant[/gold].
At the start of combat, Bird Cult enemies will flee in panic.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BELIEVER_SET.flavor: You feel an urge to sing!
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DEAD_BELL.title: Dead Man's Bell
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DEAD_BELL.description: Whenever you deal damage, if the target's HP is not full, apply an additional [blue]12[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SANDS_OF_TIME.title: Sands of Time
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SANDS_OF_TIME.descriptio: At the end of your turn, all enemies lose HP equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of their Max HP × the current turn number.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SANDS_OF_TIME.flavor: Life flows like time; only at death does it stop.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AGELESS_WATCH.title: Ageless Watch
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AGELESS_WATCH.descriptio: Once per combat, [gold]right-click[/gold] this relic to restore your HP to the amount at the start of combat and remove all debuffs.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AGELESS_WATCH.flavor: "You are as old as you feel." — An unnamed 17-year-old beauty
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TWISTED_POCKET_WATCH.des: Whenever you play [blue]12[/blue] cards, gain a new turn at the end of your turn.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TWISTED_POCKET_WATCH.fla: Time is like water in a sponge; if you squeeze, there's always more.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ALARM_BELL.title: Alarm Bell
STSBOSSANCIENTS-OLD_PHOTO.title: Old Photograph
STSBOSSANCIENTS-OLD_PHOTO.description: At the start of your turn, choose up to [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] and return it to your hand; it costs [blue]0[/blue] the first time played.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-OLD_PHOTO.flavor:
A photograph from the Ironclad's legion days.
— If only we could go back to the past.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-OLD_PHOTO.selectionScree: Choose up to [blue]1[/blue] card to return to hand.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SIX_REALMS_REINCARNATION:
Every [blue]6[/blue] turns, increase your bonus energy cap by {IncEnergy:energyIcons()}.
Current bonus energy cap: {Energy:energyIcons()}.
A relic condensed from the remains of the Hexaghost, possessing incredible power.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MADNESS_TORCH.title: Madness Torch
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MADNESS_TORCH.descriptio:
[gold]Right-click[/gold] this relic to toggle its effect.
Playing cards no longer costs {Energy:energyIcons()}; instead, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the card.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MADNESS_TORCH.flavor: A torch imbued with the power of madness. The flame is not just a mass of frenzy but the blazing of rampaging life force.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEURISTIC_ANALYSIS.title: Heuristic Analysis
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEURISTIC_ANALYSIS.descr: Whenever you draw a [purple]Curse[/purple] or [red]Status[/red] card, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEURISTIC_ANALYSIS.flavo: Simulate execution or analyze program logic in a sandbox to determine if it is malicious based on behavior patterns.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-VOLATILE_CORROSIVE_AGENT: When you apply [gold]Poison[/gold] to an enemy, apply it to all enemies instead (if already all-enemy, double the effect).
An extremely potent poison that volatilizes in the air, no longer requiring deliberate targeting.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ROYAL_GENTLEMAN_CANE.des: Once per combat, [gold]right-click[/gold] this relic to [gold]Stun[/gold] all enemies.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ROYAL_GENTLEMAN_CANE.fla: Symbolizing the inviolable majesty of royalty, it intimidates all who dare offend the king.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLUTTON_HEART.title: Gluttonous Heart
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLUTTON_HEART.descriptio: Whenever an enemy dies, increase your Max HP by [blue]20%[/blue] of that enemy's Max HP.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLUTTON_HEART.flavor: Lips long for taste, fingers yearn to grasp; even the air seems full of possibilities like juicy pulp—prick it and it might flow out.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MALIGNANT_TUMOR.title: Malignant Tumor
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MALIGNANT_TUMOR.descript: All enemies have [blue]50%[/blue] less Max HP, but when a non-[gold]Minion[/gold] enemy (and some others) dies for the first time, it splits into [blue]2[/blue] enemies with [blue]50%[/blue] of the original Max HP, and they are [gold]Stunned[/gold] on their first turn.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-MALIGNANT_TUMOR.flavor: "After extracting the hyperproliferation gene, I tried injecting it into some organisms to create a biological immortality elixir. This is part of the first test subject. Though the result was a failure, at least I didn't come away empty-handed?" — Lan Weide
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PROLIFERATION_GENE_FRAGM: Upon pickup, choose a card from your [gold]deck[/gold] and give it the [purple]Proliferation[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
A fragment of the genes of a cell known as "cancer," with endless and chaotic proliferative ability.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIME_BALL.title: Slime Ball
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIME_BALL.description: Upon pickup, give up to [blue]7[/blue] cards in your [gold]deck[/gold] the [purple]Stable[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIME_BALL.flavor: "Slime excrement... has unparalleled stickiness. Once it gets on your hands, you can't get it off without peeling off a layer of skin. Honestly, if not for research, I wouldn't want to touch this stuff!" — Lan Weide
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SPECIAL_LUBRICANT.title: Special Lubricant
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SPECIAL_LUBRICANT.descri: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]9[/blue] [gold]Special Slippery[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SPECIAL_LUBRICANT.flavor: "How interesting! This slime's bodily fluid has amazing lubricating properties, just like those slippery fish!" — Lan Weide
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIME_TOP_HAT.title: Slime Top Hat
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIME_TOP_HAT.descriptio: At the start of combat, summon [blue]3[/blue] [green]Friendly Slimes[/green].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIME_TOP_HAT.flavor: A mafia-style top hat, symbolizing the Slime Boss's status among slimes.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-NON_NEWTONIAN_FLUID.desc: Whenever you are attacked, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the current count, then increase the count by 25% of the damage taken (rounded down). The count resets at the end of combat.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-NON_NEWTONIAN_FLUID.flav: A part extracted from the Slime Boss. It seems to have a unique property: the stronger the attack, the stronger the defense.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-KNIGHT_CHESS_PIECE.title: Knight Chess Piece
STSBOSSANCIENTS-KNIGHT_CHESS_PIECE.descr: Whenever you [gold]Evoke[/gold] an Orb, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ROYAL_VENOM.title: Royal Venom
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ROYAL_VENOM.description: When [gold]Poison[/gold] deals damage, apply an equal amount of [gold]Doom[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ROYAL_VENOM.flavor: A potent venom prepared by the royal family. To this day, no one has drunk it and survived.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ROYAL_GUARD.title: Royal Guard
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ROYAL_GUARD.description:
Whenever you are attacked, if you have an [gold]Attack[/gold] card in hand, automatically play it against the attacker.
If that card's damage is not less than the attacker's intent value, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMPION_BELT.title: Champion's Belt
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMPION_BELT.descriptio:
Whenever you apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMPION_BELT.flavor: Only the strongest deserve this belt.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-EXECUTION_DEVICE.title: Execution Device
STSBOSSANCIENTS-EXECUTION_DEVICE.descrip: Whenever an enemy's [gold]Doom[/gold] stacks exceed its current HP, instantly kill that enemy.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-EXECUTION_DEVICE.flavor: A precision killing machine; just press a button to activate.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HERO_SWORD.title: Hero's Sword
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HERO_SWORD.description:
Whenever you defeat an [red]Elite[/red]/[purple]BOSS[/purple], increase the count by [red]3[/red]/[purple]5[/purple].
At the start of [red]Elite[/red] and [purple]BOSS[/purple] combats, gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the count (current: {Power:diff()}).
At the start of normal combats, gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to half the count (current: {HalfPower:diff()}).
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HERO_SWORD.flavor: The more you fight, the braver you become. True heroes never fear challenges.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-KNIGHT_HEAVY_ARMOR.title: Knight's Heavy Armor
STSBOSSANCIENTS-KNIGHT_HEAVY_ARMOR.descr: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards, gain [blue]19[/blue] [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-KNIGHT_HEAVY_ARMOR.flavo: Heavy armor bought with absolute reliability.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BROKEN_CROWN.title: Broken Crown
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BROKEN_CROWN.description:
In card reward screens, choose from [blue]1[/blue] fewer card.
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BROKEN_CROWN.flavor: The Champion's golden crown, though slightly damaged after a thousand years of wind and frost...
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CONSPIRACY_PLAN_BOOK.des: At the end of your turn, choose any number of cards to [gold]Retain[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CONSPIRACY_PLAN_BOOK.sel: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Retain[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CONSPIRACY_PLAN_BOOK.fla: A plan book for a conspiracy to overthrow the Architect's rule in the tower.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLORY_SHIELD.title: Glory Shield
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLORY_SHIELD.description:
Whenever you are attacked, if the enemy does not break through your [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
Otherwise, remove all [gold]Strength[/gold] gained this way and all debuffs.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GLORY_SHIELD.flavor: The Champion's shield. Perhaps his arrogant nature wasn't innate but came from this shield.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-FRAGMENT_ORGANIZER_PROGR: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Fragment Organize[/gold] to your hand.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HUNTRESS_BLADE.title: Huntress Blade
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HUNTRESS_BLADE.descripti:
Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
Your hand has no size limit.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HUNTRESS_BLADE.flavor: A well-preserved ancient weapon made of an unknown material. The spiritual energy barely contained inside makes the weapon tremble slightly.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-IRONCLAD_LEGION_COLLECTI: All cards with "Strike" in their name are played an additional [blue]1[/blue] time.

One of the Collector's items.
When the Ironclad Legion was still alive, a soldier once entered the tower by mistake and was captured by the Collector after exhaustion.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DOOMSDAY_SCROLL.title: Doomsday Scroll
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DOOMSDAY_SCROLL.descript: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], reduce the enemy's Max HP by the same amount.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DOOMSDAY_SCROLL.flavor: This scroll describes a terrifying entity: the Great Enemy, a shadow that devours all, craving destruction.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-THORN_CROWN.title: Thorn Crown
STSBOSSANCIENTS-THORN_CROWN.description:
Upon pickup, add a [gold]Pain[/gold] to your deck.
Whenever you enter a new room, lose [blue]3[/blue] HP.
At the start of your turn, lose [blue]2[/blue] HP, then gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Whenever you lose HP, increase your Max HP by [blue]1[/blue].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-THORN_CROWN.flavor: Heavy is the head that wears the crown.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BRAIN_IN_JAR.title: Brain in a Jar
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BRAIN_IN_JAR.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]deck[/gold] and give them the [purple]Madness[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BRAIN_IN_JAR.flavor: Is everything you perceive truly real?
STSBOSSANCIENTS-RUNE_CUBE.title: Rune Dodecahedron
STSBOSSANCIENTS-RUNE_CUBE.description: At the start of your turn, if your HP is not full, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-RUNE_CUBE.flavor: The runes on it are indecipherable.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TORCH_HEAD_DOLL.title: Torch Head Doll
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TORCH_HEAD_DOLL.descript: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Ignite[/gold] to [blue]2[/blue] random enemies.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TORCH_HEAD_DOLL.flavor: A miniature torch head doll. Its deceptive cute appearance often makes people overlook the hidden dangers.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_SCEPTER.title: Hellfire Scepter
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_SCEPTER.descrip: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Frail[/gold] to all enemies.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HELLFIRE_SCEPTER.flavor: A scepter emitting ghostly green flames, symbolizing the Collector's rule over the torch heads.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATIC_CORE.title: Automatic Core
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATIC_CORE.descripti: At the start of your turn, randomly [gold]Channel[/gold] Orbs equal to your orb slot cap.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATIC_CORE.flavor: The core of the Bronze Automaton, containing the secrets of automation.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CLOCKWORK_GEAR.title: Clockwork Gear
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CLOCKWORK_GEAR.descripti: Every [blue]3[/blue] cards you draw, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CLOCKWORK_GEAR.flavor: Stores elastic potential energy to drive the gear system, ensuring continuous operation of mechanical devices.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PRECISION_ATOMIC_CLOCK.d: At the start of your turn, gain {Stars:starIcons()} equal to the current turn number.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PRECISION_ATOMIC_CLOCK.f: Though its payload and mission have ended, its function remains perfect.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-NANOBOT_MUD.title: Nanobot Mud
STSBOSSANCIENTS-NANOBOT_MUD.description: At the start of your turn, if your HP is less than it was at the start of the previous turn, change your HP to that previous amount.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-NANOBOT_MUD.flavor: A carefully preserved complex of microscopic self-replicating nanomachines.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LEARNING_ALGORITHM.title: Learning Algorithm
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LEARNING_ALGORITHM.descr:
At the end of combat, randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random card in your [gold]deck[/gold].
After each combat, upgrade an additional [blue]1[/blue] card.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-LEARNING_ALGORITHM.flavo: A complex self-learning algorithm that stimulates neural nodes to evolve rapidly.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ARTIFICIAL_ARMOR.title: Artificial Armor
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ARTIFICIAL_ARMOR.descrip:
Whenever you are affected by a debuff, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
Whenever a [purple]Curse[/purple] or [red]Status[/red] card enters your hand, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-ARTIFICIAL_ARMOR.flavor: A shell crafted by the Architect himself, offering greater protection than ordinary artificial products.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BACKUP_BATTERY.title: Backup Battery
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BACKUP_BATTERY.descripti:
Once per turn, [gold]right-click[/gold] this relic to restore {Energy:energyIcons()} to maximum.
Each use restores {Energy:energyIcons()} less; resets after combat.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-BACKUP_BATTERY.flavor: "This design ensures a continuous energy supply during battle." — Architect
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_BALL.title: Copper Ball
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_BALL.description:
Upon pickup, choose [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]deck[/gold] to remove and store in this relic.
Once per combat, [gold]right-click[/gold] this relic to add the stored cards to your hand.
You can adjust the cards stored in this relic at rest sites.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_BALL.selectionScr: Choose [blue]2[/blue] cards to suspend inside the Copper Ball.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_BALL.flavor: "This little thing is perfect for storing some less frequently used tools, making them easier to access when needed." — Architect
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SUPER_BEAM_CD.title: Hyper Beam CD
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SUPER_BEAM_CD.descriptio: Upon pickup, add a [gold]True Hyper Beam[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SUPER_BEAM_CD.flavor: A strange disc. Insert it into the back of your head to learn a new technique.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GALAXY_STAR.title: Galaxy Star
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GALAXY_STAR.description: Whenever you enter a new room, if you have at least [blue]30[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold], lose [blue]30[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] and randomly trigger a positive effect.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GALAXY_STAR.flavor: Life is less a race than a game of chance.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_JOINT_BUCKLE.desc: [gold]Ostia[/gold] loses at most [blue]3[/blue] HP in a single instance.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COPPER_JOINT_BUCKLE.flav: A limiting device to prevent joint overload.
